title: Pure Optimization
description: A simple but rigorous optimization modpack for 1.21.
body:
Just something I wanted to put together. This might not be the optimal combination for optimization, but I did my best based on wanting to get the best experience without necessarily changing anything critical about the game or creating any major tradeoffs. You should be able to use this set of mods on top of many other mods, be they content mods or other optimization mods. (Although I should say that InstantlyFast seemed to have some conflicts so I opted to not include it here. If you know more about this kinda stuff and want to make changes to include InstantlyFast, be my guest. This modpack was made with the idea of being a baseplate that you can build off of. Theoretically this is compatible with most other mods.)

I don't know what I'm doing, so here's the list of mods if you want to just start it manually, just in case I'm stupid and did something wrong lol

- [BadOptimizations](https://modrinth.com/mod/badoptimizations) by thosea
- [Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby) by Johni0702
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) by shedaniel
- [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe) by FoundationGames
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) by tr7zw
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) by modmuss50
- [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) by modmuss50
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) by malte0811
- [Fzzy Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/fzzy-config) by fzzyhmstrs
- [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) by comp500
- [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) by coderbot
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) by jellysquid3
- [Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix) by MehVahdJukaar
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) by Prospector
- [Particle Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/particle-core) by fzzyhmstrs
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) by jellysquid3

- [Very Many Players (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/vmp-fabric) by ishlandmc
- [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) by XanderIsDev
